sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17214" key="a)trixe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀτρῐχέω</orth>, <sense id="n17214.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not to be hairy,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:10:15:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.15.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
